zh.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Conyers於大約1446年出生在英國藍卡爾宏比時，她的父親Sir Christopher Conyers64歲，母親Margaret Waddeley22歲。她於1467年與Henry Pudsey Esq.在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在英國越可爾斯吉普頓享年55歲，埋葬在英國越可爾博爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Conyers于大约1446年出生在英国藍卡爾宏比时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Conyers64岁，母亲Margaret Waddeley22岁。她于1467年与Henry Pudsey Esq.在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在英国越可爾斯吉普頓享年55岁，埋葬在英国越可爾博爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Conyers was born about 1446, in Hornby, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Christopher Conyers, was 64 and her mother, Margaret Waddeley, was 22. She married Henry Pudsey Esq. in 1467, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1500, in Skipton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Bolton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Conyers est née environ 1446, à Hornby, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Christopher Conyers, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Margaret Waddeley, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Pudsey Esq. en 1467, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Skipton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Bolton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Conyers um 1446 in Hornby, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Conyers 64 und ihre Mutter Margaret Waddeley 22. Sie hat 1467 in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England Henry Pudsey Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Skipton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Bolton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Conyers è nata il circa 1446 nel Hornby, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Christopher Conyers, aveva 64 anni e sua madre, Margaret Waddeley, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry Pudsey Esq. nel 1467, nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel Skipton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Bolton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Conyersが約1446年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビーで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Conyersは64歳，母Margaret Waddeleyは22歳であった。1467年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルでHenry Pudsey Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプトンで55歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアボルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Conyers(이)가 대략 1446년 영국 랭카실르 호른비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Conyers(은)는 64세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Waddeley(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1467년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 Henry Pudsey Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 요르크실르 스키프턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 볼턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Conyers nasceu aproximadamente 1446, em Hornby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Christopher Conyers, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Waddeley, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Pudsey Esq. em 1467, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Bolton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Conyers родилась около 1446 г. в местности хаурнби, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Conyers было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Waddeley, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Pudsey Esq. в 1467 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности скиптон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности болтон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Conyers nació aproximadamente 1446, en Hornby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Christopher Conyers, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Margaret Waddeley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Henry Pudsey Esq. en 1467, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1500, en Skipton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Bolton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
